chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of a Woman Whose Husband Has Passed Away

text: 5672 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فِي حَدِيثٍ آخَرَ : "إِنْ كَانَ دَخَلَ بِهَا فَلَهَا اَلصَّدَاقُ كَامِلاً".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5672 - And Imam (as) said in another narration:
"If he had consummated the marriage with her, then she is entitled to the full dowry (ṣadaq)."
